payload.title: paste2sawa is paused
payload.reason: Pushing v2.1.0. OPR is back (and SLR is in this time), smart mode flags NCA cases, and check serial shows last cause down.

added.title: OPR is back, SLR included
added.sub: Runs through CSP now. Works for both SLI and SLR with no ACS or exception gates.

added.title: Smart mode for NCA
added.sub: Panel tells you when an SLR needs NCA reporting.

added.title: Last cause down on check serial
added.sub: Latest outage reason shows up with the rest of the data.
